content_preservation: The 'Textbook and/or Resource Materials' section is empty; its content is found under 'Course Schedule'.
structural_coherence: Textbook and resource materials are incorrectly placed under 'Course Schedule' instead of 'Textbook and/or Resource Materials'.

new_false_positives: Section 600 (34728) Production and Inventory Control Fall 2026 - College Station
new_boilerplate: Work submitted by a student as makeup work for an excused absence is not considered late work and is exempt from the late work policy (Student Rule 7).
proposals.reasoning: The identified false positives are either course identifiers, specific labels for textbook details, or short descriptive phrases that are not true section headers. The boilerplate text refers to a specific 'Student Rule 7', indicating it's a university-wide policy. The text cleanups address the explicit duplicate 'Credit Hours: 3' entry and remove the redundant ' Syllabus' from the main course title.
